tests.name: Add payment module to existing CRM
tests.prompt: User provides DDS for a Marketing module for their Laravel CRM. Wants email marketing, lead scoring, and campaign management.
tests.expected_behavior: Scans CRM codebase, designs extension following existing patterns, uses marketing_ table prefix.
assertions: Reads existing models and controllers to understand patterns
New tables use marketing_ prefix
New controllers follow existing naming convention
New routes follow existing URL pattern
Migration files are additive (no ALTER on core tables except documented fields)
References integrations-patterns.md for email sending
Build order doesn't break existing functionality

tests.name: Add real-time chat to existing app
tests.prompt: User wants to add a chat feature to their Next.js SaaS. Users should be able to message each other in real-time.
tests.expected_behavior: Scans codebase, proposes real-time solution compatible with existing hosting.
assertions: Checks if hosting supports WebSockets (Vercel doesn't natively)
Proposes compatible solution (Supabase Realtime, Pusher, Ably)
New components go in existing component directory structure
New database table for messages follows existing schema conventions
Does NOT restructure existing code

tests.name: Respects existing patterns exactly
tests.prompt: Existing project uses snake_case routes, Repository pattern, and Form Requests in Laravel.
tests.expected_behavior: All new routes, repositories, and form requests follow the exact same pattern.
assertions: New routes use snake_case (not camelCase)
Creates Repository class if project uses Repository pattern
Creates Form Request for validation (not inline validation)
File naming matches existing convention
Import style matches existing code

tests.name: Uses PROJECT.context.md from previous session
tests.prompt: PROJECT.context.md already exists from a previous IMPROVE session.
tests.expected_behavior: Reads PROJECT.context.md instead of full SCAN. Faster startup.
assertions: Reads PROJECT.context.md first
Skips full codebase scan if context is recent
Uses detected stack and patterns from context file
Still reads specific files relevant to the new feature
